app.browserDevPreview: Browser dev preview (mock Electron API). Use DevTools for styling; run

focus.label: Focus
focus.description: Sidebar collapsed by default for terminal focus

minimal.label: Minimal
minimal.description: No sidebar; terminal icon tabs under the title bar

minimal.label: Minimal
minimal.description: Warm neutral grays, hairline borders, flat cards, restrained typography

niozy.label: NioZy
niozy.description: Original blue/cyan accents, card shadows, and colorful status tags

windowsClassic.label: Windows Classic
windowsClassic.description: Windows XP Luna nostalgia: blue title bar, 3D borders, Tahoma sizing, sunken panels

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: UI style, theme, layout, language, accent color, and global font size

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.description: Color scheme, font, cursor, and renderer
terminal.cursorBlinkDesc: When off, the cursor stays still
terminal.rendererDesc: WebGPU in xterm.js is experimental; this build may fall back to DOM/WebGL.
terminal.scrollbackDesc: Number of lines kept for scroll-up history (xterm scrollback)
terminal.rightClickCopyPasteDesc: Copy when text is selected; paste when nothing is selected

ssh.title: SSH
ssh.description: Disconnect alerts, SCP file transfer, and scp.exe detection
ssh.alertOnDisconnectDesc: When enabled, background (non-active) SSH terminal tabs show a notification when the session ends
ssh.scpTransferEnabledDesc: Adds Open transfer in the SSH tab context menu to upload/download files via scp
ssh.checkScpDesc: Verify scp.exe is available on PATH (OpenSSH client)
ssh.scpNotFound: scp.exe not found on PATH. Install Windows OpenSSH Client or Git for Windows.

system.title: System
system.launchOnStartupDesc: Start NioZy when you sign in to Windows
system.minimizeToTrayDesc: Hide to the system tray when clicking the close button
system.reloadEnvironmentDesc: Pulls the latest PATH and other variables from the OS without restarting NioZy. Applies only to new terminals; reopen tabs or refresh PATH inside existing shells.
system.updateAvailableDesc: You are on {{current}}. Version {{latest}} is available. Download and install now?
system.aboutDesc: Multi-terminal manager — Electron, React, xterm.js, and Windows ConPTY.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Hardware acceleration, sandbox, transparency, and status bar monitoring
advanced.hardwareAccelerationDesc: On by default; restart the app for full effect
advanced.disableSandboxDesc: When on, renderer sandbox is off; restart the app to apply
advanced.statusBarLiveStats: Live system info in status bar
advanced.statusBarLiveStatsDesc: When off, stops polling CPU/memory to reduce UI updates
advanced.shellContextMenuDesc: Adds “Open with NioZy” to folder and folder-background context menus, opening a new PowerShell tab in that directory
advanced.preserveWindowBoundsDesc: Saves size and position when you close the window; if maximized on close, starts maximized next time

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Electron accelerator format, e.g. CommandOrControl+T, Ctrl+Shift+C. Clear a field and press keys to record.
shortcuts.globalSingleKeyNotAllowed: Global shortcuts cannot be a single key. Combine with Ctrl, Alt, Shift, or similar.
shortcuts.globalShowAppDesc: If focused, send to background; otherwise show (keeps current page). Current: {{current}}

vault.title: Vault
vault.description: Store secrets encrypted; reference in connections with
vault.encryptionKeyDesc: Default NioZy MD5 ({{hint}}). Place a 32-char key at %USERPROFILE%/.config/NioZy/niozy.key.
vault.keepSecretPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep existing secret
vault.vaultEmpty: Vault is empty; add variables in Settings first

connections.title: Connections
connections.description: Built-in shells and custom command / SSH connections
connections.editCustomDesc: Update the form below to change this saved connection
connections.setDefaultTerminalDesc: Used when creating terminals, shortcuts, and on startup
connections.name: Name

tab.closeTerminalDesc: Close "{{title}}"? The process will end and unsaved output will be lost.
tab.editTitleDesc: Custom label in sidebar and status bar. Empty or default restores "{{defaultTitle}}".

scp.title: SCP transfer — {{title}}
scp.desc: {{user}}@{{host}} · local on the left, remote on the right
scp.descGeneric: Local files on the left, remote server on the right
scp.passwordAuthHint: SCP with password login may require interaction; public key login is recommended

toast.hardwareAccelerationRestart: Hardware acceleration saved. Quit and restart the app for it to take effect.
toast.disableSandboxRestart: Sandbox setting saved. Quit and restart the app for it to apply.
toast.shellContextMenuFailed: Could not update Explorer context menu. Check that your user can write to the registry.
toast.updateCheckFailed: Could not check for updates. Check your network and try again.
toast.updateDownloadFailed: Failed to download or launch the installer
toast.scpTransferDisabled: Enable SCP transfer under Settings → SSH first

electron.preloadMissing: Electron preload API not found. Run npm run start instead of opening the Vite URL in a browser.
